transcript-quant.Task: Quantify transcript expression from simulated paired-end RNA-seq reads against the provided transcriptome reference.
transcript-quant.Prompt:
Perform transcript quantification on the provided paired-end RNA-Seq reads using the transcriptome reference. The output should be a .tsv file with the following columns:'transcript_id'	'count'.<example>transcript_id	count
ENST000000001	523</example> Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
